summary: Provision a brand-new Managed Streaming for Kafka (MSK) cluster. No MSK estate exists yet, so this is a first stand-up an engineer reviews before it applies.

operations.title: Provision a new MSK cluster
operations.summary: Request a brand-new MSK (Kafka) cluster; an engineer finalizes and reviews the Terraform before it applies.
operations.description: Stand up a Kafka cluster as a complete specification: broker size and count, network placement, and encryption. Submitting routes it to an engineer with a draft Terraform block to review and finish — nothing is applied without review.

params.name: cluster_name
params.label: Cluster name
params.help: Names the cluster in the MSK console and the generated draft.

params.name: kafka_version
params.label: Kafka version
params.help: The Kafka version every broker runs.

params.name: number_of_broker_nodes
params.label: Number of broker nodes
params.help: Must be a whole multiple of the number of subnets picked below.

params.name: instance_type
params.label: Broker instance type
params.help: Size class for processor and memory on every broker.

params.name: subnets
params.label: Subnets
params.help: At least two subnets, each in a different Availability Zone.

params.name: client_broker_encryption
params.label: Client-broker encryption
params.help: How producers and consumers connect to the brokers. TLS is the secure default.

params.name: in_cluster_encryption
params.label: Broker-to-broker encryption
params.help: Always on from birth — written into the draft, never asked.

params.name: encryption_at_rest_kms_key
params.label: Encryption key
params.help: Leave blank to use the default AWS-managed key. Pick a key only for a customer-managed CMK.

params.name: client_auth_iam
params.label: IAM client authentication
params.help: Lets clients authenticate to brokers using IAM roles instead of certificates or SASL/SCRAM secrets.

params.name: resource_name
params.label: Cluster name tag
params.help: Shown as the name everywhere — consoles, tickets, this portal.

params.name: description_tag
params.label: What this cluster carries
params.help: One line an operator can act on at 3 AM.

params.name: pic
params.label: Person in charge
params.help: Who to call about this cluster.

decisions: A custom MSK configuration (configuration_info) and broker-level parameter overrides are engineer decisions
Mutual TLS (client certificate authentication) and Kafka ACLs are engineer decisions — this form enables IAM authentication by default
Open monitoring (Prometheus/JMX) and broker logging destinations are engineer follow-ups after creation
Public access and multi-VPC connectivity are engineer decisions — brokers are VPC-internal only by default
